intent: Invert harness integration in the-flow: move all /eng-harness-flow --event firing OUT of the stage sub-skills and INTO one flow-owned reference (references/harness-seams.md) that owns where/when each seam fires + two-layer detection + node-emission + not-installed silent path. Engine print-then-offers each seam at the Graph edge; emit per-phase harness-retro nodes whenever the router is installed (status reflects provisioning, never vanish). Graceful no-op when absent. Document the resync process + upstream source-of-truth INSIDE the plan doc (no extra scripts/physical tracking).
plan_note: 2026-06-16: atomic plan pass -> flow-owned-harness-seams-plan.md (Simple, 1 phase, 8 tasks T001-T008, Status READY). Informal validate pre-pass (3 agents): APPROVE-WITH-FIXES, V1-V4 applied. 2026-06-17: FORMAL validate-v2 skill run (4 read-only agents incl. mandatory Thesis + Forward-Compat): VALIDATED WITH FIXES — 0 CRITICAL/HIGH, 2 MEDIUM + 6 LOW all applied. Key fix: the harness command is a LITERAL print-then-offer (coach.md precedent), NOT rendered via the-flow's § Command grammar (invariants #1/#9) - my earlier V2 wording had mislabeled it. Plus deterministic grep gates (T004 `! grep -rnE '/eng-harness-flow --event'`, T005 stale-prose grep), per-phase retro `branch_of` pinning, docs/how dir creation, 3-surface emission rule. Formal Validation Record persisted to the plan. 2026-06-17: REVISED events->hooks (021 lifecycle hooks) — the-flow emits --hook (pre-flight/pre-coding/post-coding/post-flight; --event permanent alias; skips silent coding hook). Resync re-anchored on the live `--hooks --json` manifest. Mechanical alias-swap, design/thesis unchanged, Status stays READY. Plan v1.1.0. ALSO tightened (user principle 'sub-skills just focus on their things'): the 3 mention files (25-workshop/70-review/62-progress) are now stripped FULLY harness-blind — all harness references gone, not just command literals; review's tier framing moves up to coach.md. After T004 no verb retains any harness awareness (AC-02/KF-01/T004/Goals/Summary/Risks updated). 2026-06-17: IMPLEMENT COMPLETE — 8/8 tasks [x]; authored flow-owned harness-seams.md, all 8 sub-skills harness-blind (firing+concept greps EMPTY), Graph/render/schema/template/coach/SKILL/CLAUDE/docs-how/getting-started done; check-flow L1-L6 clean, 13 slugs no collisions, JSON valid, redeployed (canonical store updated). 2026-06-17: REVIEW #1 = REQUEST_CHANGES (F001 HIGH + F002-F005). All fixed — F001 resolved Option A per user (backpressure = ADVISORY OUTPUT; plan verb stays harness-blind, fold-in promise removed everywhere); F002 node-emission = installed+provisioned gate; F003 template --json + abbreviated note; F004 old-router = runtime-gap not auto-fallback; F005 coach intro. Re-verified (no fold-in language, concept-grep EMPTY, JSON ok, check-flow clean) + redeployed. RE-REVIEW pending.
harness: Installed router = Jun-11 --event-only build (343 lines). The 021 hook-aware router (478 lines, --hook + --hooks manifest) is PR-up on branch 021-harness-flow-hooks but unmerged/uninstalled. This repo is also unprovisioned (no .harness/, no governance doc) — so seams noop and this flow's own flight plan carries no harness nodes. To make --hook live at runtime: merge 021->main + push + reinstall. (The unprovisioned gap is exactly what plan-033 fixes for the produced contract.)
